name: Raahim Rubaiyat Teertho
designation: Guitarist, Singer, Songwriter (EIDA, TheCleanupCrew, Quiet on Purpose, North Dhaka Khaep Service)
review: Working with Jagot Jit is always a delight. He's been my go to producer for a while now. He's very fun and easy to work with. His communication skills along with his music production skills are admirable. I highly recommend that you approach Jagot for your future musical endeavors.

name: Shuprio Shahi Teerno
review: Jagot's production style is very unique and cooperative. It's very easy to work with him and you can feel a sense of security that he will shape your song exactly the way you envisioned it.

name: Ashfaqul Alam
designation: Founder of WatchTower Studios, Member of Shrapnel Method
review: JJ made working fun from day one. Things just flowed from our first note and couldn’t be happier with the outcome. You can tell he truly cares about everything he does in the studio, and outside. This makes me work repeatedly with this dude. Godspeed! .

name: Aftab Moin Audhip
review: A very reliable producer who truly knows his craft

name: Umme Iyman
review: Jagot is really quick. It takes him literally one second to come up with new ideas or solve technical problems

name: Syed Apurbo
review: One of the best recording engineers and music producers I've ever worked with. Jagot is one of the few people whose input on any music aspect is valued and much appreciated between me and my fellow musicians.
